label: F-003 RESOLVED: usage_limited is dead - zero production writers; exhaustively enumerated all 7 status: writes; only occurrence is VALID_STATUSES declaration L54

usage_limited reserved-but-unwired: design iter-10 reserved it for external provider/runtime usage-limit refusal detection, but no detection seam was implemented; budget_limited half is fully wired (accountUsage L941/L944, recordContinuationBudgetStop L1180) but usage_limited half is enum-membership-only. Remediation fork: (A) collapse enum or (B) wire provider-usage detector on session.idle/message.updated

All non-active statuses are gated out of injection (getActiveGoal L1004 status===active), verification (L1080), and continuation (reserveContinuationTurn L1194). usage_limited if set would be a quiet terminal status, not a hazard - defect is absence-of-writer not mishandling
